title: Car comparison
content: Audi RS7 vs BMW M4: Audi is more comfortable, BMW is more sporty. Depends on what you prefer.

title: Future plan
content: In the future I want to buy a sporty car. First step is to finish university and get a good job.

title: Last movie watched
content: I recently watched Interstellar. It was emotional and very visually impressive.

title: What I like in movies
content: I like movies with deep meaning, good music and strong characters.

title: Watchlist
content: I want to watch Breaking Bad and Supernatural next. Both are highly recommended.

title: Learning Python
content: Today I learned about variables, functions and data types in Python.

title: Understanding APIs
content: API is a way for systems to communicate. FastAPI makes it easier to build such systems.

title: Applying knowledge
content: I used FastAPI to build endpoints and store notes in a JSON file. It helped me understand how backend works.
